channel.title: Tianling Pavilion — Chinese Metaphysics & Dream Interpretation
channel.description: Free guides to Ziwei, Bazi, Qimen Dunjia, Zhou Gong dream interpretation, Chinese zodiac, feng shui, and more ancient Chinese wisdom.

item.title: Chinese Zodiac Years: Complete Birth Year Table 1924-2031 | Tianling Pavilion
item.description: Find your Chinese zodiac sign by birth year — complete table from 1924 to 2031. Includes element, personality traits, and compatibility for all 12 animal signs.

item.title: Year of the Dragon 2026: Fortune, Career & Love Predictions | Tianling Pavilion
item.description: 2026 Dragon zodiac forecast — career growth, love prospects, health tips, and monthly predictions. Free Chinese zodiac reading for Dragon people.

item.title: Chinese Face Reading: Nose Shapes That Reveal Your Wealth Fortune | Tianling Pavilion
item.description: Discover what your nose shape says about wealth, career success, and personality in Chinese Mian Xiang face reading. Complete guide to nose fortune analysis.

item.title: Dream Dictionary A-Z: 100+ Symbols Explained with Chinese Wisdom | Tianling Pavilion
item.description: Complete A-Z dream dictionary combining Zhou Gong's ancient wisdom with modern psychology. Decode 100+ dream symbols from animals to zombies. Free dream interpretation.

item.title: Free Bazi Calculator Guide: How to Read Your Four Pillars Chart | Tianling Pavilion
item.description: Learn to read your Bazi chart with our free calculator — decode your Day Master, Five Elements balance, luck cycles, and 10 Gods. Complete beginner's guide to Four Pillars of Destiny.

item.title: Year of the Horse 2026 Predictions: Career, Love, Health & Wealth | Tianling Pavilion
item.description: Complete 2026 fortune predictions for Horse zodiac — career breakthroughs, love compatibility, health tips, and wealth luck. Free Chinese zodiac reading.

item.title: Dream Dictionary A-Z: 100+ Chinese Dream Symbols Explained | Tianling Pavilion
item.description: Comprehensive Chinese dream dictionary with 100+ symbols from A to Z. Discover what water, snakes, teeth, flying, death, and more mean in dreams — based on Zhou Gong's ancient wisdom and modern psychology.

item.title: Feng Shui Wealth Corner: Complete Guide to Attract Money & Prosperity | Tianling Pavilion
item.description: Complete Feng Shui wealth corner guide. Learn where your money area is, how to activate it with colors, crystals, plants, and symbols. 15 proven wealth corner fixes that attract money and abundance.

item.title: Chinese Zodiac 2026 Year of the Horse Predictions: Career, Love & Wealth Forecast | Tianling Pavilion
item.description: Complete 2026 Year of the Horse predictions for all 12 Chinese zodiac signs. Get your career, love, health, and wealth forecast for the Horse year with actionable Feng Shui tips.

item.title: Dream Color Symbolism: Free Zhou Gong Meaning Guide | Tianling Pavilion
item.description: Colors in dreams carry powerful meanings in Chinese dream interpretation. Free guide to what red, blue, gold, black, and every shade reveals about your subconscious.

item.title: Dream Colors & Emotions: Free Zhou Gong Decoding | Tianling Pavilion
item.description: What do colors and emotions in your dreams mean? Free Zhou Gong dream interpretation guide decoding red, black, gold, fear, and joy through Chinese dream tradition.

item.title: Dream Symbols A-Z: Free Zhou Gong Dictionary Guide | Tianling Pavilion
item.description: Complete A-Z guide to common dream symbols with Zhou Gong interpretation. Free Chinese dream dictionary covering hundreds of symbols and their traditional meanings.

item.title: Free Dream Journal Method: Remember Every Dream | Tianling Pavilion
item.description: Learn to keep a dream journal that improves recall and reveals patterns. Free step-by-step guide to dream interpretation through consistent recording and decoding.

item.title: How to Decode Dreams: Free Zhou Gong Interpretation | Tianling Pavilion
item.description: Learn the ancient art of Zhou Gong dream interpretation. Free guide to decoding dream symbols, recurring themes, and unlocking messages hidden in your dreams.

item.title: How to Remember Dreams: Free Proven Techniques | Tianling Pavilion
item.description: Stop forgetting your dreams tonight. Free guide with evidence-based techniques from neuroscience and Zhou Gong dream interpretation to dramatically improve dream recall.

item.title: Lucid Dreaming Chinese Methods: Free Ancient Guide | Tianling Pavilion
item.description: Discover traditional Chinese methods for lucid dreaming. Free guide combining Zhou Gong techniques with Taoist dream yoga for conscious dream exploration.

item.title: Nightmares to Wisdom: Free Dream Transformation Guide | Tianling Pavilion
item.description: Nightmares are intense messages from your deeper self. Free guide to ancient Chinese dream alchemy techniques for extracting hidden guidance from dark dreams.

item.title: Recurring Dreams Decoded: Free Meaning Guide | Tianling Pavilion
item.description: Why the same dreams repeat night after night. Free Zhou Gong dream interpretation guide to the five most common recurring dream themes and what they reveal.

item.title: Recurring Dreams Guide: Why Dreams Repeat Free | Tianling Pavilion
item.description: Your recurring dream is not random — your subconscious is signaling. Free Zhou Gong dream interpretation guide to what repeat dreams mean and how to break the cycle.

item.title: Top 10 Common Dreams: Free Zhou Gong Meaning Guide | Tianling Pavilion
item.description: Discover the 10 most common dreams across cultures. Free Zhou Gong dream interpretation guide to falling, being chased, teeth falling out, flying, and more.

item.title: 28 Chinese Constellations: Free Birth Star Guide | Tianling Pavilion
item.description: Discover your birth star among the 28 Chinese constellations. Free guide to the Azure Dragon, Vermilion Bird, White Tiger, and Black Tortoise star mansions and their meanings.

item.title: Bazi Day Master Guide: Your Elemental Personality | Tianling Pavilion
item.description: Learn what your Bazi Day Master reveals about your core personality. Complete free guide to the ten Day Masters in Chinese Four Pillars of Destiny astrology.

item.title: Bazi Four Pillars: Your Complete Destiny Blueprint | Tianling Pavilion
item.description: Master the Bazi Four Pillars of Destiny with this free guide. Learn how your birth year, month, day, and hour shape your life path, career, and relationships.

item.title: Free Bazi Luck Cycles: Decode Your 10-Year Fortune | Tianling Pavilion
item.description: Understand how Bazi Decennial Fortune Cycles shape your destiny. Learn to identify when your career, wealth, and relationships will flourish with this free Chinese astrology guide.

item.title: Chinese Metaphysics vs Western Astrology: Free Guide | Tianling Pavilion
item.description: How Ziwei, Bazi, and Qimen compare to Western astrology and tarot. Free guide to the fundamental philosophical differences between Eastern and Western divination.

item.title: Year of the Dog: Chinese Zodiac Personality & Fortune Guide | Tianling Pavilion
item.description: Free guide to the Chinese Zodiac Dragon sign. Discover Dragon personality traits, lucky elements, career fortune, love compatibility, and 2026 predictions.

item.description: Complete free guide to the 12 Chinese zodiac signs. Discover your animal sign, personality traits, lucky elements, and romantic compatibility with other signs.

item.title: Free Birthstone Meanings: Chinese Divination Guide | Tianling Pavilion
item.description: Discover what your birthstone reveals about destiny and fortune. Free Chinese metaphysics guide to all 12 birthstones, their meanings, and how to use them for luck.

item.title: Free Lucky Numbers: Chinese Numerology Fortune Guide | Tianling Pavilion
item.description: Calculate your personal lucky numbers using Chinese numerology and Bazi. Free step-by-step guide with practical applications for fortune, love, and success.

item.title: Free Palm Reading Guide: 5 Lines That Reveal Destiny | Tianling Pavilion
item.description: Learn palm reading step by step with this free guide. Discover what your life line, head line, heart line, fate line, and sun line reveal through ancient Chinese palmistry.

item.title: Face Moles Meaning: Free Mian Xiang Beauty Mark Guide | Tianling Pavilion
item.description: Every face mole has meaning in Chinese face reading. Free Mian Xiang guide to what your beauty marks reveal about luck, wealth, and love from forehead to chin.

item.title: Chinese Face Reading: Free Mian Xiang Beginner Guide | Tianling Pavilion
item.description: Discover Mian Xiang, the 2000-year-old Chinese face reading art. Free guide to what your facial features reveal about career, wealth, relationships, and destiny.

item.title: Free Mian Xiang: Ear Shape & Eyebrow Fortune Reading | Tianling Pavilion
item.description: Your ears and eyebrows reveal destiny in Chinese face reading. Free Mian Xiang guide to what ear size, eyebrow shape, and features say about wealth and longevity.

item.title: Free Feng Shui Colors Guide: Meanings & Directions | Tianling Pavilion
item.description: Discover how Feng Shui colors and compass directions shape your home energy. Free guide to the Bagua map, five elements, and the best colors for every room.

item.title: Feng Shui Home Basics: Free Guide to Harmony | Tianling Pavilion
item.description: Learn essential Feng Shui principles for every room. Free guide covering door placement, bed positioning, the Bagua map, and elemental balance for modern homes.

item.title: Five Elements Daily Life: Free Wu Xing Living Guide | Tianling Pavilion
item.description: Apply Wu Xing Five Elements philosophy to your home, work, and relationships. Free guide to how Wood, Fire, Earth, Metal, and Water shape everyday experience.

item.title: How to Ask Divination Questions: Free Accurate Guide | Tianling Pavilion
item.description: Learn to formulate divination questions for accurate readings. Free guide to consulting Ziwei, Bazi, and Qimen Dunjia for clear, actionable Chinese fortune telling.

item.title: How to Calculate Your Bazi Chart: Free Step Guide | Tianling Pavilion
item.description: Learn to calculate your own Bazi Four Pillars chart with this free step-by-step guide. Master Heavenly Stems and Earthly Branches without professional Chinese astrology software.

item.title: Qimen Dunjia Daily Life: Free Timing for Success | Tianling Pavilion
item.description: Apply Qimen Dunjia to everyday decisions. Learn when to sign contracts, schedule meetings, travel, and make big moves based on cosmic energy with this free guide.

item.title: Qimen Dunjia: Free Guide to Strategic Divination | Tianling Pavilion
item.description: Discover Qimen Dunjia, the ancient Chinese art of strategic timing. Free guide to the nine palaces, eight doors, and cosmic energy patterns for better decision-making.

item.title: Qimen Dunjia Eight Doors: Free Timing Guide | Tianling Pavilion
item.description: Master the Eight Doors of Qimen Dunjia for optimal timing. Learn how Open, Rest, Life, Harm, Obstruction, View, Death, and Fear doors guide your most important decisions.

item.title: Taoism & Chinese Divination: Free Spiritual Guide | Tianling Pavilion
item.description: How Taoist philosophy — the Dao, Wu Wei, and Yin-Yang — provides the spiritual foundation for Ziwei, Bazi, Qimen, and dream interpretation. Free Chinese metaphysics guide.

item.title: Wu Xing Five Elements: Free Guide to Your Destiny | Tianling Pavilion
item.description: Understand the Five Elements — Wood, Fire, Earth, Metal, Water — and how their creation and destruction cycles influence your Bazi chart and life path. Free guide.

item.title: Free Yin Yang Balance Guide: Taoist Harmony Living | Tianling Pavilion
item.description: Yin and Yang is the oldest framework for life balance. Learn how this Taoist concept applies to health, relationships, career, and daily decisions with this free guide.

item.title: I Ching for Beginners: Free Book of Changes Guide | Tianling Pavilion
item.description: Learn to consult the 3000-year-old Book of Changes with this free guide. Discover how to cast hexagrams and interpret I Ching wisdom for modern life decisions.

item.title: I Ching Introduction: Free Book of Changes Guide | Tianling Pavilion
item.description: Beginner-friendly free guide to I Ching. Learn the 64 hexagrams, Yin-Yang philosophy, and how to consult the ancient Book of Changes for personal guidance today.

item.title: Free Ziwei Dou Shu: Master the 12 Palaces Deep Dive | Tianling Pavilion
item.description: Deep dive into each of the 12 palaces in Ziwei Dou Shu astrology. From Life Palace to Parents Palace, discover how every sector shapes your complete destiny for free.

item.title: Ziwei Dou Shu 12 Palaces: Free Star Chart Guide | Tianling Pavilion
item.description: Explore all 12 palaces of Ziwei Dou Shu in this free Purple Star Astrology guide. Understand what each sector of your star chart reveals about destiny, career, and love.

item.title: Ziwei Dou Shu 14 Stars: Hidden Meanings Revealed | Tianling Pavilion
item.description: Complete free guide to the 14 major stars in Ziwei Dou Shu. From Purple Emperor to Ruinous Army, discover what each star reveals about your destiny and personality.

item.title: Free Ziwei Dou Shu: Master the Four Transformations | Tianling Pavilion
item.description: The Four Transformations are the engine of Ziwei Dou Shu. Learn how Hua Lu, Hua Quan, Hua Ke, and Hua Ji shape your destiny in this free Purple Star Astrology guide.

item.title: Free 2026 Chinese Zodiac Forecast: Year of the Horse | Tianling Pavilion
item.description: Discover your free Chinese zodiac forecast for 2026, Year of the Fire Horse. Love, career, wealth, and health predictions for every animal sign in the Chinese zodiac.

item.title: Chinese Zodiac Love Compatibility: Free Match Guide | Tianling Pavilion
item.description: Discover which Chinese zodiac signs truly match for love. Free guide to Six Harmonies, Three Unions, and hidden clashes that matter more than your animal sign.

item.title: Bazi Compatibility: How Your Day Master Reveals Your Perfect Match | Tianling Pavilion
item.description: Free Bazi love compatibility guide. Learn how the Five Elements interact in relationships, which Day Masters attract you, and how to read compatibility from your birth chart.

item.title: Bazi Lucky Element: Find Your Personal Fortune Element & Change Your Luck | Tianling Pavilion
item.description: Free guide to finding your Bazi lucky element. Learn how your Day Master's balance reveals your personal fortune element — and how to use it for career, wealth, and relationships.

item.title: Chinese Birth Chart: Free Calculator — Find Your Zodiac, Element & Four Pillars | Tianling Pavilion
item.description: Free Chinese birth chart calculator. Enter your birth date to discover your zodiac animal, ruling element, Four Pillars chart, and what your birth chart reveals about love, career, and fortune.

item.title: Chinese Fortune Telling: 6 Ancient Systems That Reveal Your Destiny | Tianling Pavilion
item.description: Free guide to 6 authentic Chinese fortune telling systems: Bazi Four Pillars, Ziwei Dou Shu, Qimen Dunjia, I Ching, Face Reading, and Palm Reading. Learn how each system works and which one to try first.

item.title: Feng Shui Bedroom: 15 Rules for Love, Sleep & Prosperity | Tianling Pavilion
item.description: Free Feng Shui bedroom guide: bed placement, colors, mirrors, electronics, and 15 ancient rules for better sleep, romance, and wealth. Room-by-room Bagua layout included.

item.title: Feng Shui Front Door: 12 Rules for Wealth, Protection & Good Fortune | Tianling Pavilion
item.description: Free Feng Shui front door guide: the mouth of Qi. Learn door color by compass direction, what to place at your entrance, and 12 ancient rules to attract wealth and block negative energy.

item.title: Feng Shui Living Room: 11 Rules for Harmony, Wealth & Family Connection | Tianling Pavilion
item.description: Free Feng Shui living room guide: furniture arrangement, sofa placement, TV position, coffee table rules, and 11 ancient techniques to create a harmonious, wealth-attracting gathering space.

item.title: Feng Shui for Love: 10 Ways to Attract Romance & Deepen Relationships | Tianling Pavilion
item.description: Free Feng Shui love guide: activate your relationship corner, best love crystals and colors, what to place in your bedroom, and 10 proven Feng Shui techniques to attract romance and deepen partnerships.

item.title: Feng Shui Office Desk: 10 Rules for Career Success & Productivity | Tianling Pavilion
item.description: Free Feng Shui desk guide: desk placement, direction, what to put on your desk, and 10 proven rules to boost career luck, focus, and productivity at work.

item.title: Feng Shui Tips: 25 Quick Energy Fixes for Wealth, Love & Harmony | Tianling Pavilion
item.description: 25 free Feng Shui tips you can apply today. Quick fixes for your front door, bedroom, living room, office desk, and wealth corner — no renovation needed.

item.title: Feng Shui for Wealth: 10 Proven Ways to Attract Money & Abundance | Tianling Pavilion
item.description: Free Feng Shui wealth guide: activate your money corner, best wealth plants and crystals, what to place in your wealth area, and 10 proven Feng Shui techniques to attract financial abundance.

item.title: Palm Reading Lines: Complete Guide to 7 Lines That Reveal Your Destiny | Tianling Pavilion
item.description: Free palm reading guide to all 7 major lines: Life Line, Head Line, Heart Line, Fate Line, Sun Line, Marriage Line, and Health Line. Learn what each line reveals about love, career, health, and fortune.

item.title: Free Dream Meaning: What Animals in Your Dreams Reveal | Tianling Pavilion
item.description: Free Chinese dream interpretation guide: what do animal dreams mean? Zhou Gong dream dictionary reveals hidden messages from cats, dogs, birds, fish, tigers, and more animal dream symbols.

item.title: Dreaming of Blood: Free Zhou Gong Dream Meaning | Tianling Pavilion
item.description: Blood dreams are intense and unforgettable. Free Zhou Gong dream interpretation guide to what dreaming of blood means — from injury to menstruation to blood in water.

item.title: Dreaming of Being Chased: Free Dream Meaning Guide | Tianling Pavilion
item.description: Being chased in dreams is terrifying and common. Free Zhou Gong dream interpretation guide revealing what your pursuer really means and how to stop chase dreams.

item.title: Dreaming of the Dead: Free Zhou Gong Dream Meaning | Tianling Pavilion
item.description: Dreaming of dead relatives is emotionally charged. Free Chinese dream interpretation guide to what ancestor dreams, corpses, and death dreams reveal about your waking life.

item.title: Dreams About Exams: Free Zhou Gong Test Dream Guide | Tianling Pavilion
item.description: Still dreaming about failing tests? Free Zhou Gong dream interpretation guide reveals what exam dreams really mean about anxiety, self-worth, and life transitions.

item.title: Dreaming of Falling: Free Zhou Gong Interpretation | Tianling Pavilion
item.description: Falling dreams are among the most common nightmares. Free Zhou Gong dream interpretation guide to what falling dreams predict about stress, loss, and waking life.

item.title: Dreaming of Fire: Free Zhou Gong Dream Meaning Guide | Tianling Pavilion
item.description: Fire dreams are powerful symbols in Chinese dream interpretation. Free guide to what flames reveal about emotions, career, relationships, and spiritual transformation.

item.title: Dreaming of Floods: Free Zhou Gong Water Dream Guide | Tianling Pavilion
item.description: Water flood dreams carry deep meaning in Chinese dream tradition. Free Zhou Gong guide to what overwhelming water dreams reveal about emotions and life changes.

item.title: Dreaming of Flying: Free Flight Dream Meaning Guide | Tianling Pavilion
item.description: Flying dreams signal ambition, freedom, and stress. Free Zhou Gong dream interpretation guide to what flight dreams reveal about your subconscious and waking life.

item.title: Dreaming of Ghosts: Free Zhou Gong Spirit Dream Guide | Tianling Pavilion
item.description: Ghost dreams bridge daily anxieties and the spirit realm. Free Chinese dream interpretation guide to spirit possession, ancestral messages, and sleep paralysis dreams.

item.title: Dream Houses & Rooms: Free Zhou Gong Dream Decoder | Tianling Pavilion
item.description: Dreaming of strange houses or hidden rooms? Free Zhou Gong dream interpretation guide decoding 7 house dreams — from empty mansions to locked doors and childhood homes.

item.title: Dreaming of Marriage: Free Wedding Dream Meaning | Tianling Pavilion
item.description: Wedding dreams are rarely about literal marriage. Free Zhou Gong dream interpretation guide to what marriage dreams reveal about love, career, and self-growth.

item.title: Dreaming of Money: Free Zhou Gong Wealth Dream Guide | Tianling Pavilion
item.description: Money dreams carry specific meanings in Zhou Gong tradition. Free Chinese dream interpretation guide to what coins, cash, and gold dreams mean for career and fortune.

item.title: Dreaming of Pregnancy: Free Zhou Gong Dream Meaning | Tianling Pavilion
item.description: Pregnancy dreams signal fertility, creativity, and new beginnings. Free Zhou Gong dream interpretation guide to what baby and pregnancy dreams really mean for you.

item.title: Dreaming of Snakes: Free Zhou Gong Snake Dream Guide | Tianling Pavilion
item.description: Snake dreams are among the most complex symbols. Free Zhou Gong dream interpretation guide to what snake dreams mean in Chinese tradition — wisdom, danger, or transformation.

item.title: Dreaming of Teeth Falling Out: Free Meaning Guide | Tianling Pavilion
item.description: Teeth-falling dreams provoke deep anxiety. Free Zhou Gong dream interpretation guide combining Chinese tradition and modern psychology to decode this universal nightmare.

item.title: Dreaming of Water: Free Complete Interpretation Guide | Tianling Pavilion
item.description: Water dreams carry deep symbolic meaning. Free Zhou Gong dream interpretation guide to what oceans, rivers, floods, and rain reveal about emotions and fortune.

item.title: Free Feng Shui Mirror Guide: 7 Placement Rules for Wealth & Protection | Tianling Pavilion
item.description: Free Feng Shui mirror placement guide: learn 7 ancient rules for where to hang mirrors to attract wealth, deflect negative energy, and protect your home. Mirror direction by Bagua compass school.
